_meta.purpose: Maps the three barrier islands to the MLS area / subdivision / postal code values used by IdxListingGrid to filter Stellar MLS listings to that island. Per spec §6b, these values drive the per-island IDX feeds inside the Barrier Islands pillar page.
_meta.note: Once Ryan confirms the actual MLS Area Major / Area Minor values used by Stellar for each island, replace the FILL_IN_MLS_AREA arrays. Postal codes are seeded from the existing src/data/areas.json.

islands.name: Lido Key
islands.tagline: FILL_IN: 1-sentence island positioning in Ryan's voice
islands.editorial: FILL_IN: 250-400 words on Lido Key as a buying decision specifically — proximity to St. Armands Circle, Gulf vs bay orientation, beachfront condo character, who's buying, what compares well, what to know about flood zones and rebuilding standards. Reads as a complete answer to 'Lido Key new construction' even when the project list is empty.

island_faqs.question: FILL_IN: e.g. 'Is there new construction on Lido Key right now?'

islands.name: Longboat Key
islands.editorial: FILL_IN: 250-400 words. Longboat is the 10-mile barrier island stretching to Anna Maria — gulf-to-bay properties, the country club / resort core mid-island, the quieter north-end estates, the south-end proximity to St. Armands. Cover the building-height regulations that have constrained new construction here historically, and what is currently in pre-development. Reads as a complete answer even when the project list is empty.

islands.name: Siesta Key
islands.editorial: FILL_IN: 250-400 words on Siesta as a luxury new-construction destination — quartz-sand beaches, Siesta Village vs Crescent Beach vs Turtle Beach, the rental-economics pull (vacation rental allowances differ from Lido and Longboat), and the resale-vs-new dynamic. Reads as a complete answer even when the project list is empty.
